title: 20 x 3-Ply Disposable Napkins, Yellow, 33 x 33 cm, Made in Germany
features: Each pack contains 20 napkins. These are each 3-ply, so not too thin.
Design: beautiful motif print as table decoration (colour variations possible)
Quality: these paper napkins are produced in Germany under high quality standards and are subject to constant control
Environment: the production takes place only from environmentally friendly raw materials and is biodegradable

Dimensions: the motif napkins are 33 x 33 cm when open. Folded in the pack to 16.5 x 16.5 cm. You can see 1/4 of the motif in the main picture. By the way: the napkins are suitable for crafting with decoupage / napkin technique
description: Product details: motif napkins – design as shown in the picture (colour variations possible) – image = ¼ of the napkin – back blank – 3-ply – 1 pack of 20 pieces – format open: 33 x 33 cm – folded to: 16.5 x 16.5 cm – material paper (tissue). e) - Made in Germany - environmentally conscious and gentle production. We offer the most beautiful designs from the napkin collection from the most famous German manufacturers. These stand for environmentally conscious and environmentally friendly production. The trendy motifs make every meal a pleasant experience. Of course, the napkins can also be used for crafting with napkin technique. One pack contains 20 napkins. Here in our shop you will also find candles, handkerchiefs, table runners, tablecloths and an almost unlimited range of other napkins
